title: sedum beauverdii subsp. beauverdii
intro: Sedum beauverdii subsp. beauverdii, also known as the Beauverd's Sedum or Golden Sedum, is a species of succulent plant in the family Crassulaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of the common cold. In herbal preparations, Sedum beauverdii subsp. beauverdii is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make capsules and tablets.
